description: Configure a Financial Report in iDempiere named 'GP Board Report' for Gross Profit analysis. The configuration must include a Report Line Set named 'Gross Profit Analysis' with lines for 'Total Revenue' (Segment Value), 'Total COGS' (Segment Value), and a 'Gross Profit' calculation (Total Revenue minus Total COGS). It also requires a Report Column Set named 'Current Period Analysis' with a 'Period Actual' column (Period Balance). Link the 'GP Board Report' to both the 'Gross Profit Analysis' Line Set and the 'Current Period Analysis' Column Set.
